description:
CarePackage

Software Management Tool
- Replaced KeePass with KeePassXC
- Replaced Visual Studio 2022 Community with Visual Studio 2026 Community
- Removed Arc
- Renamed shadPS4 to shadPS4 Launcher
- Unmarked Blender as unreliable
- Marked InkScape as unreliable
- Added .NET 10 variants
- Fixed download URL resolving for the following software:
  - Cheat Engine (thanks for making the download URL suspicious by giving the exe a random name each request)
  - LibreWolf
  - mpv
  - Oracle VirtualBox
  - Overwolf
  - pgAdmin 4
  - PHP variants
  - RPCS3
  - shadPS4
  - Thunderbird
  - Waterfox
  - Windows App SDK
